conjectures.title: Toxiproxy latency toxic is purely additive — observed latency = baseline + injected ± jitter, with no compounding or absorption effects
conjectures.hypothesis: Measure baseline and degraded latency across 50 requests; delta should be within injected ± jitter range for >95% of samples

conjectures.title: nomic-embed-text via Ollama meets <100ms RTB SLA under clean proxy conditions
conjectures.hypothesis: Run 100 embedding requests through clean proxy; p99 latency must be <100ms

conjectures.title: TCP slicer toxic preserves JSON validity after reassembly at 1-byte avg chunk size
conjectures.hypothesis: Send 50 requests through slicer(avg_size=1); all must parse as valid JSON with identical schema

conjectures.title: Prism mock + Toxiproxy fully replaces live PokéAPI for test scenarios
conjectures.hypothesis: All PokéAPI tests pass against Prism with same status codes; diff response schemas

conjectures.title: Bandwidth throttle effect on response time scales proportionally with payload size
conjectures.hypothesis: Compare elapsed time for 1KB vs 10KB vs 100KB payloads at fixed 1KB/s cap; ratio should be within 20% of payload size ratio
